title: Market Entry Snapshot
subtitle: Netflix / Jio
description: Analyse one city or region for product or service expansion using pricing, competitors, and customer segments.
deliverable: Upload your Excel comparison table + PESTLE analysis document as a single PDF to Google Drive.

manualTasks.title: Choose target city
manualTasks.detail: Pick one city (e.g. Mohali, Ludhiana, Chandigarh) and define scope.

manualTasks.title: Competitor mapping
manualTasks.detail: List 4–5 competitors by hand using secondary research only. No AI.

manualTasks.title: Customer segment sketch
manualTasks.detail: Draw 2–3 customer personas by hand using demographics and needs.

manualTasks.title: PESTLE framework
manualTasks.detail: Write 1–2 points per PESTLE factor manually in your notebook or Word.

aiTasks.title: Google Trends demand signals
aiTasks.detail: Use Google Trends to compare search interest across 3 cities for your product.

aiTasks.title: ChatGPT PESTLE refinement
aiTasks.detail: Use ChatGPT to expand and validate your manual PESTLE with current data.

aiTasks.title: Excel AI comparison table
aiTasks.detail: Build a structured competitor comparison table using Excel AI features.

title: Customer Journey Mapping
subtitle: Zomato / Swiggy
description: Map the end-to-end customer journey from order placement to delivery and identify 3 friction points.
deliverable: Upload your complete journey map (visual) + friction point analysis table to Google Drive.

manualTasks.title: Map customer touchpoints
manualTasks.detail: Draw the full order-to-delivery journey by hand: 8–10 touchpoints minimum.

manualTasks.title: Identify friction points
manualTasks.detail: Identify exactly 3 friction points from personal experience or observation. No AI.

manualTasks.title: Emotion curve
manualTasks.detail: Draw a basic customer emotion curve across the journey manually.

manualTasks.title: Insight note
manualTasks.detail: Write a 150-word manual insight note: what matters most to the customer.

aiTasks.title: ChatGPT journey framework
aiTasks.detail: Use ChatGPT to structure your journey map using a formal CX framework.

aiTasks.title: Excel AI issue-frequency table
aiTasks.detail: Build a table ranking friction points by frequency and impact using Excel AI.

aiTasks.title: Canva AI visual map
aiTasks.detail: Create a polished visual journey map using Canva AI design tools.

title: Startup Business Model Study
subtitle: Google for Startups / Microsoft
description: Analyse the revenue model, cost structure, and value proposition of a live or recently funded startup.
deliverable: Upload your Business Model Canvas + scenario model output (from Colab) to Google Drive.

manualTasks.title: Select a funded startup
manualTasks.detail: Choose a real Indian startup funded in 2023–2025 from Tracxn or YourStory.

manualTasks.title: Manual BMC
manualTasks.detail: Fill in all 9 blocks of the Business Model Canvas by hand using secondary research.

manualTasks.title: Revenue model breakdown
manualTasks.detail: Write out the revenue streams and estimate proportions manually.

manualTasks.title: Value proposition note
manualTasks.detail: Write 100 words: what problem does this startup solve and for whom?

aiTasks.title: Notion AI BMC refinement
aiTasks.detail: Use Notion AI to expand and structure your Business Model Canvas.

aiTasks.title: ChatGPT viability assessment
aiTasks.detail: Prompt ChatGPT to assess the startup's viability using your BMC data.

aiTasks.title: Google Colab scenario model
aiTasks.detail: Open the Colab notebook above. Input revenue and cost assumptions to run break-even scenarios.

title: Functional Dashboard Creation
subtitle: Microsoft / Google
description: Build a 3–4 KPI dashboard using structured business data with Excel AI and Power BI or Looker Studio.
deliverable: Upload your Power BI / Looker Studio dashboard screenshot + Excel data file to Google Drive.

manualTasks.title: Select 4 KPIs
manualTasks.detail: Choose 4 business KPIs (e.g. Sales, CAC, Churn Rate, Revenue Growth). Justify each.

manualTasks.title: Sketch dashboard layout
manualTasks.detail: Draw your dashboard layout by hand: which chart for which KPI and why.

manualTasks.title: Collect or fabricate data
manualTasks.detail: Create a 12-row structured dataset manually in a notebook (use realistic numbers).

manualTasks.title: Data structure note
manualTasks.detail: Write a brief note describing your data schema and what each column means.

aiTasks.title: Excel AI data cleaning
aiTasks.detail: Import your manual data into Excel. Use AI features to clean and structure it.

aiTasks.title: Google Colab KPI computation
aiTasks.detail: Open Colab above. Run the KPI calculation script and export a cleaned CSV.

aiTasks.title: Power BI / Looker Studio dashboard
aiTasks.detail: Build a 3–4 KPI visual dashboard. Apply AI insights where available.
